1000622680.english: No matter how formidable the firepower of the Doombringer and Cannoneer is, it would be unreasonable to wipe them all out with artillery and bombing alone.
1000622680.korean: 아무리 둠브링어와 캐노니어의 화력이 막강하다한들, 포격과 폭격만으로 전부 소탕하기에는 무리가 있-

1000622689.english: No matter how much I process it, there is no end to it...

1000622693.english: ...I'm sorry, unnie. I ended up like this too...

1000622701.english: More details later. We did launch a surprise attack, but there are still many Iron Bugs remaining.
1000622701.korean: 자세한 이야기는 나중에. 기습을 하긴 했지만 아직 철충이 많이 남아 있습니다.

1000622702.english: You will be safe if you hide here.

1000622705.english: I'll help too. I can still fight...!
1000622705.korean: 저도 도울게요. 아직 싸울 수 있어요...!

1000622706.english: ...fighting with such an injury is reckless.
1000622706.korean: ...그런 부상을 입은 상태로 싸우는 건 무모합니다.

1000622710.english: Please make sure that our rescue of you does not go to waste.
1000622710.korean: 저희가 당신을 구해낸 것이 허사가 되진 않도록 해주세요.

1000622713.english: I'm glad to hear you are safe. That's a relief.

1000622715.english: No, thanks to you, I was able to deal with the Iron Bug much more easily.
1000622715.korean: 아닙니다. 당신 덕분에 훨씬 수월하게 철충들을 처리할 수 있었습니다.

1000622716.english: Hmm... looks like it's all over, right?

1000622717.english: Huh? We were a bit late, but you were still holding out, so I thought you might be a high-ranking bioroid from some military unit...
1000622717.korean: 어라? 저희가 좀 늦었는데도 버티고 계시길래 어디 군부대의 대장급 바이오로이드인가 했는데...

1000622720.english: That's right, that's right~ Belongs to Companion. Right?

1000622721.english: I've seen them before~ I remember them clearly because the companions are all so cute~
1000622721.korean: 예전에 본 적 있어요~ 컴패니언 분들은 하나같이 귀여우셔서 확실히 기억하고 있거든요~

1000622724.english: Snow Feather, excuse me for a moment?

1000622726.english: I am a nanomachine. I cannot heal your wounds, but I can boost your strength enough to hold out until you reach a safe place.
1000622726.korean: 나노머신이에요. 상처를 치료해드릴 수는 없지만, 안전한 곳으로 갈 때까지 버틸만한 기력은 돋구어드릴 수 있어요.

1000622727.english: Well... there are some side effects, though. Just very slightly.
1000622727.korean: 뭐... 부작용이 있긴 하지만요. 아주 살짝.

1000622729.english: Hehe, that sounds like a story. Shall I hear that later?
1000622729.korean: 후후, 사연이 있어보이는데, 그건 나중에 들을게요?

1000622730.english: Alright, sisters~ Let's head back now~

1000622734.english: ...There are more people than I thought.

1000622735.english: It has been quite a while since we started relief work.

1000622737.english: Following the leader's will, we travel around the world rescuing and protecting bioroids in danger.
1000622737.korean: 저희는 리더의 뜻에 따라 세계 각지를 돌아다니며 위험에 처한 바이오로이드들을 구출, 보호하고 있습니다.

1000622738.english: Except for a few people including myself and the leader, most of the people here were rescued and joined in that way.
1000622738.korean: 저와 리더를 포함한 몇 명을 빼곤, 여기 계신 분들 대부분이 그렇게 구출되어 합류하신 분들입니다.

1000622740.english: Oh my~ You have good energy. I'm starting to feel some side effects, but is it okay if I stand up?
1000622740.korean: 어머~ 기운 좋네요. 슬슬 부작용이 있을텐데, 일어나 있어도 되나요?

1000622741.english: I feel a little dizzy, but it's okay.

1000622743.english: Leader, it is almost time for the meeting for the next operation.
1000622743.korean: 리더, 곧 다음 작전을 위한 회의 시간입니다.

1000622745.english: Well then, Snow Feather, make some rest. It's safe here.
1000622745.korean: 그럼 스노우 페더, 편하게 쉬어요. 여긴 안전하니까요.

1000622750.english: I was trying to make an alarm device.

1000622751.english: This is... a rock in a can?

1000622754.english: That's true! This kind of analog device could actually catch them off guard.
1000622754.korean: 그렇네요~! 이런 아날로그적인 장치가 오히려 허를 찌를 수 있겠어요.

1000622756.english: You've gotten a bit used to living here by now, haven't you?
1000622756.korean: 이제 여기서 지내는 것도 좀 익숙해졌죠~?

1000622759.english: Okay~ Where were we going today again~

1000622762.english: Um, can you take me with you too...?
1000622762.korean: 저, 저도 데려가 주실 수 있나요...?

1000622765.english: Even so... deploying into an operation without any preparation like this...
1000622765.korean: 아무리 그래도... 이렇게 준비도 없이 작전에 투입하는 건...

1000622766.english: Besides, Feather is still bothered by the fact that she lost the bio-android she was traveling with to the Iron Bug, right?
1000622766.korean: 거기다, 페더는 철충에게 같이 다니던 바이오로이드 분을 잃은 걸 계속 마음에 두고 있잖아요~?

1000622767.english: If I go into battle in that state... hmm...

1000622768.english: I think we should entrust the protection of the relief recipients to them.
1000622768.korean: 구호 대상의 보호를 맡기면 될 것 같습니다.

1000622770.english: For now, fighting on the front lines is not allowed. Instead.
1000622770.korean: 일단은 전방에서 싸우는 건 안 돼요. 대신.

1000622771.english: Just like when we first met, this time Feder is going to save someone else. Got it?
1000622771.korean: 저희가 처음 만났을 때처럼, 이번엔 페더가 다른 분을 구해드리는 거예요. 알겠죠?

1000622773.english: Th-then I'll hurry up and get ready and be right back!

1000622775.english: ...Hehe, he's such a cute and admirable child. Isn't he?
1000622775.korean: ...후후, 정말 귀엽고 기특한 아이에요. 그렇지 않나요?

1000622776.english: That is correct. Just like before, I think it will be of great help in combat as well.
1000622776.korean: 그렇습니다. 지금까지처럼, 전투에서도 큰 도움이 될거라고 생각합니다.

1000622777.english: That is, as long as they don't act impulsively out of revenge. Hmm... I'm actually a bit worried...
1000622777.korean: 복수심 때문에 돌발행동을 하지 않는다면요. 음... 아무래도 걱정되는데...

1000622778.english: Judging by their behavior so far, I don't think that will be the case.
1000622778.korean: 지금까지의 행동을 보면 그렇진 않을 것 같습니다.

1000622779.english: Because, just as you said, he is a bright and admirable child.

1000622781.english: Still, please don't step forward too much today and stay near Feather.
1000622781.korean: 그래도 오늘은 너무 나서지 말고 페더 근처에 있어주세요.

1000622783.english: Feather! Where should I move this?

1000622790.english: Huh...? Is it that one this time? Uh, it looks really heavy...?
1000622790.korean: 어...? 이번엔 저거야? 어, 엄청 무거워보이는데...?

1000622791.english: Ahaha... That must be good exercise... Haha...

1000622796.english: This is the last ship, so please bear with it just a little longer.
1000622796.korean: 이 배가 마지막이니까 조금만 더 고생해요.

1000622798.english: Oh, by any chance, have you found a place to settle down?

1000622799.english: The Black Warm went to look around~

1000622800.english: I looked around once beforehand, so it shouldn't take that long—
1000622800.korean: 저번에 미리 한 번 둘러봤으니, 그리 오래 걸리지는-

1000622801.english: Oh my, hehe. You're getting so worked up before I can even finish speaking!

1000622804.english: Yes. You are working very hard.

1000622805.english: How about the northern part of the island? Since there used to be a town and a military base there, I think it would be easy to get supplies.
1000622805.korean: 섬 북쪽은 어때요? 예전에 시가지랑 군부대가 있던 곳이라 물자를 구하기 편할 것 같은데.

1000622807.english: I think you should go and see for yourself.
1000622807.korean: 한 번 직접 가보셔야할 것 같습니다.

1000622810.english: ...That's strange. It definitely wasn't there during the preliminary research...

1000622811.english: On top of that, the movement is a bit strange.

1000622812.english: You're just standing there doing nothing~? Hmm...

1000622813.english: When I visited earlier, I confirmed that it did not react even when I approached within close range. However...
1000622813.korean: 아까 와보았을 때, 지근거리까지 접근해도 반응하지 않는 것을 확인했습니다. 다만...

1000622815.english: Over there, can you see the door in the distance?

1000622816.english: Let's see... Ah, so that's it~?

1000622818.english: Yes. There are signs that it was opened.

1000622819.english: It seems that it was not discovered before because it was completely covered in grass and trees.
1000622819.korean: 아마 이전에는 완전히 풀과 나무에 뒤덮여 있어서 발견하지 못한 것 같습니다.

1000622820.english: That's clearly suspicious. What about the investigation?

1000622821.english: As I approached that door, the dormant AGS units reacted in unison.
1000622821.korean: 제가 저 문으로 접근하니 휴면 상태였던 AGS들이 일제히 반응했습니다.

1000622822.english: And as soon as I took just one step back, it returned to a dormant state.
1000622822.korean: 그리고 단 한 걸음 물러서자 다시 휴면 상태로 돌아갔습니다.

1000622825.english: Even now, loading the cargo and returning to land...
1000622825.korean: 지금이라도 다시 짐을 싣고 육지로 돌아가는 것이...

1000622827.english: I barely managed to find this place, but I can't go back to land.
1000622827.korean: 여기도 겨우겨우 찾았는데 다시 육지로 돌아갈 순 없어요.

1000622828.english: ...In the end, the fact that the number of people became too large...

1000622829.english: Stop it~ If we end up regretting that, we're basically denying everything we've done so far~?
1000622829.korean: 그만~ 그걸 후회해 버리면 지금까지 저희가 해 온 일을 전부 스스로 부정하는 거라구요~?

1000622830.english: We need to find the best solution in the current situation.

1000622832.english: Hmm... It's rare to find an island of a decent size where supplies can be obtained...
1000622832.korean: 흐음... 적당한 크기에, 물자도 구할 수 있는 섬이 흔치 않은데...

1000622833.english: Towards Europe? No, it's too far, whether by land or sea...
1000622833.korean: 유럽 쪽으로? 아냐, 육로든 해로든 너무 멀고...

1000622834.english: But crossing the Pacific is out of the question, as that area is completely Lemonade's territory...
1000622834.korean: 그렇다고 태평양을 건너자니, 그쪽은 완전히 레모네이드의 세력권인데...

1000622836.english: I guess I should hide well... Oh my?

1000622837.english: Those AGS units look like they're on the move~?

1000622839.english: Wow, those AGSs. They're super strong~

1000622840.english: Whether they were parasites or larvae, I just wiped them out with firepower before they could even get close.
1000622840.korean: 기생체건 유충이건 그냥 화력으로 근처에 오기도 전에 섬멸해버렸어요~

1000622841.english: Although the Iron Bug were few in number, there is no doubt that they were strong.
1000622841.korean: 철충이 소수였다고는 하나, 강한 것은 틀림없습니다.

1000622845.english: No matter how much I think about it, just living here has the least risk.
1000622845.korean: 아무리 생각해도 그냥 여기에 사는 게 가장 리스크가 적어요.

1000622846.english: Ah, of course, I'm not saying we should become neighbors with those AGSs, so we should probably keep our distance.
1000622846.korean: 아, 물론 저 AGS들이랑 이웃이 되자는 건 아니고, 좀 거리는 둬야겠죠~

1000622849.english: It looks like those AGS units only react to Iron Bug (Iron Bugs). That means they attract Iron Bug, too.
1000622849.korean: 저 AGS들은 철충들한테만 반응하는 모양이네요~ 그렇다는 건 철충을 끌어들인다는 뜻도 되죠~

1000622850.english: Well, we've seen enough, so shall we head back? We have a few backup spots on the other side of the island, so let's pick one of them.
1000622850.korean: 자, 볼 만큼 봤으니 돌아갈까요~? 섬 반대편에 차선으로 정해둔 후보지가 몇 개 있으니, 그 중에 하나를 골라보죠~

1000622851.english: And please assign personnel to monitor this place starting today.
1000622851.korean: 그리고 당장 오늘부터 인원을 배정해서 이곳을 감시해주세요~

1000622852.english: 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

1000622861.english: We are a relief organization that helps bioroids in danger.
1000622861.korean: 저희는 위험에 처한 바이오로이드를 돕는 구호단체에요.

1000622862.english: I will make sure you return safely.

1000622864.english: By the way, who is the person in the dress...? They seem to be really good at fighting...
1000622864.korean: 그런데 저기, 드레스 입으신 분은 누군가요...? 엄청 잘 싸우시는 것 같은데...

1000622868.english: Oh my god! A post came up saying the Commander went into the forest with Harpeia, just the two of them!
1000622868.korean: 세상에! 사령관님이 하르페이아 님이랑 단 둘이 숲 속으로 들어가셨다는 글이 올라왔어요!

1000622869.english: Th-then, this isn't the time to be doing this...!
1000622869.korean: 그, 그러면 지금 이러고 있을 때가 아닌데...!

1000622870.english: Uh, where are you going! You have to help with this!

1000622871.english: What? If you dawdle, you'll miss seeing the Commander looking exactly as he was born in the forest!
1000622871.korean: 네에? 꾸물거리다간 숲속에서 태어난 그대로의 모습이 되신 사령관님의 모습을 놓치게 된다구욧!

1000622874.english: If you keep doing that, won't the Commander scold you?

1000622875.english: Haha, you're saying you didn't order them not to take pictures?

1000622876.english: ...If you keep doing that, you're really going to get in big trouble someday.
1000622876.korean: ...그러다가 진짜 언제 한 번 크게 혼날거예요.

1000622878.english: Why, why are you acting like this?

1000622879.english: I imagined getting scolded by the Commander...

1000622881.english: Ah, anyway, it won't work. I need to finish this work quickly and expand the Steel Line Online and Secret Network servers.
1000622881.korean: 아, 아무튼 안 돼요. 빨리 작업 끝내고 스틸라인 온라인이랑 시크릿 네트워크 서버 확장해야 된다구요.

1000622882.english: Oh, right. Is that Steel Line Online fun?
1000622882.korean: 아, 맞다. 그 스틸라인 온라인이라는 거, 재밌어요?

1000622883.english: It seems like a lot of people are doing it these days, like Gremlin.
1000622883.korean: 그렘린 님도 그렇고 요새 많이들 하시는 것 같던데.

1000622884.english: Of course! I lose track of time when I play a few rounds over a beer after work.
1000622884.korean: 그럼요! 일과 끝나고 맥주 한 잔하면서 몇 판 하면 시간 가는 줄 몰라요.

1000622885.english: So I have been getting even less sleep lately, but...
1000622885.korean: 그래서 요새 더 잠이 부족해지긴 했지만...

1000622886.english: Hmm. Captain Khan is like that, and there is no one in our unit interested in that...
1000622886.korean: 흐음. 칸 대장님도 그렇고, 저희 부대에는 그거에 관심 있는 분이 없어서...

1000622887.english: Ah, I heard a rumor that the Commander is doing it too...

1000622888.english: I want to do that too! How do I do it? Can I install it on this panel as well?
1000622888.korean: 저도 할래요! 어떻게 하면 되죠? 이 패널에도 설치할 수 있나요?

1000622889.english: Th-should I call this true love...

1000622890.english: Hahaha... Even in the game, I can't miss a single move of the Commander.
1000622890.korean: 후후후... 게임 속에서도 사령관님의 일거수 일투족은 놓칠 수 없다구요.

1000622891.english: But you're really sure, right? That the Commander is doing it too?
1000622891.korean: 그런데 진짜 확실한 거죠? 사령관님도 하신다는거?

1000622892.english: I'm not entirely sure. It's just that one day, a super expert suddenly appeared and became number one in the rankings.
1000622892.korean: 확실한 건 아니에요. 그냥 어느날 갑자기 초고수 한 명이 등장해서 랭킹 1등이 됐거든요?

1000622893.english: However, information about who that person is is hidden.
1000622893.korean: 그런데 그분이 누군지 정보가 숨겨져 있어요.

1000622894.english: Um... the regular soldiers could all tell who was who, right?
1000622894.korean: 음... 일반 부대원들은 다 누가 누군지 알 수 있었죠?

1000622895.english: Yes. So, they are probably at least an adjutant, or they could be a captain. However...
1000622895.korean: 네. 그래서 아마 최소 부관급이시거나, 아니면 대장님일 수도 있구요. 다만...

1000622897.english: The Commander has been drowsy in the mornings quite often lately.
1000622897.korean: 사령관님이 요새 부쩍 아침에 잠에 취해 계신 경우가 많아서요.

1000622898.english: When I see them at breakfast, their hair is messy and they yawn...
1000622898.korean: 아침 식사하실 때 보면 머리는 부스스하고 하품을 하신다거나...

1000622899.english: I have a few photos like that; would you like to take a look?
1000622899.korean: 저 그런 사진들 몇 개 있는데, 한 번 보실래요?

1000622902.english: Hahaha... Shall I send it to you?

1000622904.english: It's okay. The only things the Commander said weren't allowed were those kinds of photos.
1000622904.korean: 괜찮아요. 사령관님이 안된다고 하신 건 그렇고 그런 사진 뿐이니까요.

1000622905.english: You're saying you actually asked them to take more of these everyday photos?
1000622905.korean: 이런 일상적인 사진들은 오히려 더 많이 찍어달라고 하셨다구요?

1000622906.english: And... to take those everyday photos, I always have to be looking at the Commander...
1000622906.korean: 그리고... 그런 일상적인 사진을 찍으려면 항상 사령관님을 보고 있어야 하고...

1000622908.english: Unfortunately, it can't be helped that a few photos like that get taken.
1000622908.korean: 아~주 불행하게도 그렇고 그런 사진이 조~금 찍히는 건 어쩔 수 없는거예요.

1000622910.english: If you're not going to accept it, I'll delete this.

1000622913.english: Uh, not that kind of thing, but things like this cute... or... cool...
1000622913.korean: 그, 그렇고 그런 거 말고 이런 귀엽거나... 멋있거나 한 것들요...

1000622914.english: Hehe, as much as you want~

1000622916.english: Seeing you so happy makes me feel so proud.
1000622916.korean: 그렇게 기뻐하는 모습을 보니 제가 다 뿌듯하네요.

1000622917.english: I'm telling you, this is why I take photos!

1000622919.english: Alright, let's get back to work. Where was I...
1000622919.korean: 이, 이제 다시 일 해요. 어디까지 했더라...

1000622920.english: Here you go. You just need to open this.

1000622923.english: Huh? There's no problem with the signal itself. The connection is working fine, too...
1000622923.korean: 어? 신호 자체는 문제가 없어요. 연결도 잘 되어있고...

1000622924.english: What? Then why is there a problem with the communication?
1000622924.korean: 네? 그럼 왜 통신에 문제가 있는 걸까요?

1000622925.english: It’s not just one unit; most of the units currently out said their communications are strange.
1000622925.korean: 한 부대도 아니고 지금 나가 있는 부대 대부분이 통신이 이상하다고 했잖아요.

1000622928.english: No, just now... I think I picked up a signal I've never seen before... Did I see it wrong?
1000622928.korean: 아뇨, 방금... 처음 보는 신호가 잡혔던 것 같은데... 잘못봤나?

1000622930.english: I guess I'll go back and try asking Fortune or Scathy for help.
1000622930.korean: 일단 돌아가서 포츈님이나 스카디님한테 도와달라고 해봐야겠어요.

1000622931.english: Wait a minute. Didn't you forget one?

1000622933.english: We definitely need to expand the servers. I'm not sure about Steel Line Online, but I heard Secret Network is in chaos these days because the traffic has skyrocketed.
1000622933.korean: 서버 확장해야죠~ 스틸라인 온라인은 잘 모르겠지만, 요새 시크릿 네트워크가 트래픽이 엄청 늘어서 난리라구요.

1000622934.english: That's probably because of the Steel Line online information sharing board.
1000622934.korean: 그건 아마 스틸라인 온라인 정보 공유 게시판 때문에 그럴 거예요.

1000622935.english: On top of that, because of that, rumors about the Secret Network spread even more...
1000622935.korean: 거기다 그것때문에 시크릿 네트워크에 대한 소문이 더 퍼지니까...

1000622936.english: Hahaha... You're saying a lot of gem-like information is being uploaded?
1000622936.korean: 후후후... 아주 주옥같은 정보들이 많이 올라온다구요?

1000622937.english: Yumi, please don't just look at game guides; take a look around other boards as well.
1000622937.korean: 유미 님도 게임 공략만 보지 마시고 다른 게시판도 한 번 둘러 보세요.

1000622939.english: I'll take a look when I have time.

1000622940.english: Let's quickly install the server we received and go back.

1000622944.english: By the way, has communication been restored?

1000622945.english: The whole operation is a mess right now because of that.

1000622948.english: This is a big problem... At this rate, we’ll have to send a messenger to communicate.
1000622948.korean: 큰일이네요... 이러다간 전령을 보내서 의사소통 하게 생겼어요.

1000622949.english: Couldn't we just halt the operation for a moment? I'm not sure how our unit is handling this...
1000622949.korean: 잠깐 작전을 중지하면 되지 않나요? 우리 부대는 어떻게 하고 있는지 모르겠네...

1000622951.english: Captain Marie was actually planning to temporarily halt the operation, but it looks like His Excellency the Commander has personally issued an order to proceed.
1000622951.korean: 안그래도 마리 대장님이 작전을 잠깐 중지하려고 하셨는데, 사령관 각하께서 직접 강행하라는 명령을 내리신 모양이에요.

1000622953.english: Yes. It seems you received an order while communication was briefly established.
1000622953.korean: 네. 잠깐 통신이 될 때 명령받으신 모양이에요.

1000622954.english: Commander, really... To think you have the composure to issue orders even while having a good time...
1000622954.korean: 사령관님도 참... 즐거운 시간을 보내는 와중에도 명령을 내리실 여유가 있으시다니...

1000622955.english: As expected, one person isn't nearly enough now... Hehehe...
1000622955.korean: 역시 이제 한 명 가지고는 어림도 없네요... 우후후...

1000622957.english: I didn't see it myself, but a post was uploaded to the Secret Network saying that you went into the forest with Harpeia.
1000622957.korean: 본 건 아니지만 시크릿 네트워크에 하르페이아님이랑 같이 숲 속으로 들어가셨다는 글이 올라왔거든요.

1000622958.english: Ah, you mean that one? The one posted on the Steel Line online information board that just opened.
1000622958.korean: 아, 그거죠? 이번에 생긴 스틸라인 온라인 정보 게시판에 붙어 있는 거요.

1000622959.english: Brownie was talking about it all the time.

1000622961.english: Conversely, it is said that Sejeongge is attached to the secret network.
1000622961.korean: 반대로 스정게가 시크릿 네트워크에 붙어있는 거랍니다.

1000622963.english: By the way, Mr. Leprechaun, do you play Steel Line Online too?

1000622964.english: Yes. Brownie asked me to do it with her, so I do it sometimes.
1000622964.korean: 네. 브라우니가 같이 하자고 해서 가끔씩 해요.

1000622966.english: What's your main character? What's your rank?

1000622967.english: Uh, I'll just be myself. I'm not very good at it.
1000622967.korean: 저, 저는 그냥 저로 해요. 별로 잘하지는 못하구요.

1000622968.english: Hmm, let's see... Ah, found it.

1000622969.english: Leprechaun 1058... The battle record... Oh my.

1000622970.english: Character Indomitable Marie has 75 matches, C-77 Red Hood has 187 matches...

1000622971.english: Wait, hold on! I didn't know you could see that, right?!
1000622971.korean: 자, 잠깐만요! 그런 것도 볼 수 있는 거였어요?!

1000622972.english: Hahaha... You mean information is a weapon? And also... Ugh.
1000622972.korean: 후후... 정보는 곧 무기라구요? 그리고 또... 에게.

1000622973.english: The T-3 Leprechaun only has 17 plates, you know?

1000622975.english: On top of that... oh my?

1000622976.english: Pfft. T-2 Brownie has over 800 matches?

1000622977.english: Oh my god... if you add it all up, it's over 1,000 rounds!

1000622978.english: I can't believe you're similar to me in staying up all night playing games...

1000622980.english: It was more fun than I thought... so I kept doing it little by little...

1000622981.english: With Red Hood, Captain Marie, and Brownie?

1000622984.english: When Brownie causes trouble again and you're stressed, playing as Brownie really relieves the stress!
1000622984.korean: 브라우니가 또 사고쳐서 스트레스 받을때 브라우니로 플레이하면 스트레스가 확 풀린다구욧.

1000622985.english: And Brownie always plays as either the Battalion Commander or the Captain!
1000622985.korean: 그, 그리고 브라우니는 맨날 연대장님 아니면 대장님으로만 플레이 한다구요!

1000622986.english: And yet, all they do is die all the time...

1000622987.english: Brownie from the same squad was number 2056, right? I'll search...

1000622990.english: No, wait... did the server have an error?

1000622991.english: That would be a big problem. There might be an issue with the Secret Network as well...
1000622991.korean: 그러면 큰일인데요? 시크릿 네트워크에도 문제가 생겼을 수도...

1000622994.english: Defeat, defeat, defeat, defeat, defeat, victory, defeat...
1000622994.korean: 패배, 패배, 패배, 패배, 패배, 승리, 패배...

1000622995.english: First of all, let me tell you that Brownie didn't try to lose on purpose.
1000622995.korean: 일단 말씀드리지만, 브라우니가 일부러 지려고 한 건 아니에요.

1000622996.english: Even though I always play my best...

1000622998.english: Well, sometimes I do just walk out, though. Brownie isn't a machine, so I get upset about losing streaks...
1000622998.korean: 가, 가끔씩은 그냥 나가버릴 때도 있긴 하지만요. 브라우니는 기계가 아니니까 연패에 속이 상해서...

1000622999.english: ...You know, sometimes when I'm bored, I randomly search through my match history.
1000622999.korean: ...저, 심심할 때 한 번씩 무작위로 대전 기록을 검색해 보거든요?

1000623000.english: But this is the first time I've seen a battle record this bright red...
1000623000.korean: 그런데 이렇게 시뻘건 전적창은 처음 봐요...

1000623002.english: Look at this... You've been reported for 'intentionally dying to the enemy'...
1000623002.korean: 이것좀 보세요... '고의로 적군에게 죽어줌' 사유로 신고당하셨어요...

1000623003.english: That won't do. I'm getting a lot of help from Brownie too, you know.
1000623003.korean: 안되겠네요. 브라우니에겐 저도 큰 도움을 받고 있으니까요.

1000623004.english: I should practice together after this swimming competition is over.
1000623004.korean: 이번 수영 대회가 끝나면 같이 연습해야겠어요.

1000623005.english: Are you participating in the Talonfeather transfer swimming competition?

1000623006.korean: 아뇨, 저는 그냥 구경하는 게... 우후후...

1000623007.english: I enjoy watching. I’ve decided to be the match commentator with Spriggan.
1000623007.korean: 구경하는 게 좋아서요. 스프리건이랑 같이 경기 해설을 맡기로 했어요.

1000623009.english: ...Um, I am going out for now, but I'm not confident in my swimming...
1000623009.korean: ...저, 저는 일단 나가긴 하는데 수영에 자신이 없어서...

1000623010.english: You got a swimsuit too, Yumi, right?

1000623011.english: You're aiming for a date with the Commander, aren't you?

1000623013.english: Hehe... As long as you are in Orca, you cannot escape my watch.
1000623013.korean: 후후... 오르카에 있는 이상 제 눈을 벗어날 수는 없답니다.

1000623014.english: You mean you saw me posing in a swimsuit in front of a full-length mirror in my room at dawn?
1000623014.korean: 새벽에 방에서 수영복차림으로 전신 거울 앞에서 포즈를 취하는 것도 다 봤다구요?

1000623015.english: And the way your face turned red, I wonder what you were thinking—
1000623015.korean: 그리고 무슨 생각을 하셨는지 얼굴이 빨개지시는 것도-

1000623016.english: ...Um, I was just thinking about going on a date with the Commander at the sea.
1000623016.korean: ...그, 그냥 사령관님이랑 같이 바다에서 데이트하는 생각을 좀 했을 뿐이에요.

1000623017.english: You don't seem as shy as I thought...?

1000623018.english: Sigh. Orca already knows that I want to go on a date with the Commander anyway...
1000623018.korean: 에효. 어차피 제가 사령관님하고 데이트 하고 싶어한다는 건 전 오르카가 다 아는걸요...

1000623020.english: Why are you looking at me? This isn't me.
1000623020.korean: 왜 저를 보세요? 이건 저 아닌데요?

1000623021.english: That's right... This is my karma...

1000623022.english: Since you sing the tune of wanting to watch a movie with the Commander, wanting to take a nap leaning on his shoulder, and wanting to go for a walk holding hands every time you drink, what can I do?
1000623022.korean: 술 마실 때마다 사령관님하고 같이 영화보고 싶네, 어깨에 기대서 낮잠자고 싶네, 손잡고 산책하고 싶네 노래를 부르시니 어쩔 수 없죠, 뭐.

1000623023.english: Ah, I think that's kind of nice, too.
1000623023.korean: 아, 그런 거 저도 좀 좋은 것 같아요.

1000623025.english: Ah, let's take turns talking more.

1000623027.english: Yes. I even did the final verification.

1000623029.english: It's a Iron Bug signal. Did I go too deep...?

1000623031.english: I think so. They are coming straight this way, aren't they?
1000623031.korean: 그런 것 같아요. 이쪽으로 똑바로 오고 있는데요?

1000623032.english: Ugh, ugh... uh, what should I do?

1000623033.english: Since there aren't that many of them, please run away first while I disrupt the signals and keep them in check.
1000623033.korean: 일단 수는 그리 많지 않으니까, 제가 신호 교란하고 견제하는 동안 먼저 도망가세요.

1000623035.english: Haha, of course. Believe it or not, I am the Horde's advisor favored by Captain Khan, you know?
1000623035.korean: 후후, 그럼요. 저는 이래봬도 칸 대장님께서 총애하는 호드의 참모라구요?

1000623036.english: My analysis of the enemy's strength is perfect. Captain Khan trusts my abilities, which is why he can charge forward with peace of mind.
1000623036.korean: 제 전력 분석은 완벽해요. 칸 대장님도 제 능력을 믿으시니까 마음 놓고 돌격하실 수 있는 거랍니다.

1000623040.english: I'm sorry. While our platoon was conducting an operation to secure the area, some Iron Bug escaped the encirclement.
1000623040.korean: 죄송해요. 저희 소대가 지역 확보 작전을 진행하던 중에 일부 철충이 포위망을 빠져나갔어요.

1000623041.english: The place where that swarm of Iron Bugs is heading is where the two of you are scheduled to work, so I came to support you first.
1000623041.korean: 그 철충 무리가 향하는 곳이 두 분께서 작업을 하기로 예정된 곳이라, 일단 저부터 지원하기 위해 왔어요.

1000623042.english: The main force will arrive soon, so we just need to stall for a bit. I'll take the lead.
1000623042.korean: 본대도 곧 도착할테니 적당히 시간을 끌면 될 거예요. 제가 앞장서죠.

1000623043.english: Oa-eun ooee ai ueun ai ieeeuia...?
1000623043.korean: 어아은 오오에에 아이 우은 아이 이어에으이아...?

1000623044.english: What on earth are you talking about?

1000623045.english: Ian. I am Ang Ian, the fox.

1000623047.english: I apologize for this. I got beaten up too much, so there seems to be an error in the voice function.
1000623047.korean: 이거 죄송합니다. 너무 얻어맞았더니 음성 기능에 오류가 생겼군요.

1000623049.english: What other joy could a robot like me have had...?
1000623049.korean: 저같은 로봇에게 달리 무슨 낙이 있었겠습니까...?

1000623050.english: Just barely surviving day by day... dragging my creaking body around to pick up scrap metal...
1000623050.korean: 그저 하루하루 연명하며... 삐걱거리는 몸을 끌고 고철이나 줍다가...

1000623051.english: I have found it...! The beauty of life! The reason for my life!
1000623051.korean: 발견하고 만 것입니다...! 생명의 아름다움을! 제 삶의 이유를!

1000623052.english: It looks like you want to break down again.

1000623053.english: Now, wait! Listen to the end.

1000623054.english: I may be mimicking a human like this... but as you can see, I am nothing but a lump of scrap metal.
1000623054.korean: 저는 이렇게 인간 흉내를 내고 있기는 하나... 보시다시피 고철 덩어리일 뿐입니다.

1000623055.english: Surprisingly, you understand the topic well.

1000623056.english: That's right. I'm just a mere tin robot...!
1000623056.korean: 그렇습니다. 저는 그저 한낱 깡통 로봇일뿐...!

1000623057.english: To someone like me, the beauty of life...! Ugh, why did I become a body that cannot touch living things...!
1000623057.korean: 그런 저에게 생명의 아름다움이란...! 큭, 어째서 저는 생물을 만지지 못하는 몸이 되어버린 겁니까...!

1000623060.english: Even if I just take a quick look at the young lady's DNA sequence— Argh!

1000623061.english: You shot again! There is a hole in my beautiful body!
1000623061.korean: 또 쏘시다니! 제 아름다운 몸체에 구멍이 났잖습니까!

1000623062.english: Ugh... If it's like this, I'll have to get some scrap metal again...

1000623063.english: Hmph. You're surprisingly quick on your feet.

1000623064.english: I definitely aimed right at the center of the core...

1000623066.english: I'm sorry. I was so annoyed that I didn't even think of you.
1000623066.korean: 미안해요. 너무 짜증이 나서 당신 생각을 미처 못했습니다.

1000623067.english: Please go away for a while. It will be noisy with gunshots for a while.
1000623067.korean: 잠깐 멀리 가 계세요. 한동안 총성때문에 시끄러울 테니까요.

1000623068.english: Wait, hold on... how many more are you planning to shoot?!
1000623068.korean: 자, 잠깐... 얼마나 더 쏘시려는 겁니까?!

1000623069.english: If I got hit by something like that— Ooh!

1000623070.english: Awesome tactical reload! It looks like I'm opening my eyes to a new beauty!
1000623070.korean: 멋진 전술 재장전! 새로운 아름다움에 눈을 떠버릴 것 같군요!

1000623071.english: Haa... let's not even talk about it.

1000623072.english: I have never felt this way before.

1000623073.english: Even when I saw Master's clumsy side not long after we met, it wasn't this bad.
1000623073.korean: 만난지 얼마 안되었을때의 주인님의 어리버리한 모습을 볼 때도 이정도까지는 아니었습니다.

1000623074.english: Ah, you mean before I was restored.

1000623075.english: I've only seen you conducting skillfully, Master...
1000623075.korean: 저는 주인님이 능숙하게 지휘하시는 모습만 봐서...

1000623076.english: It was absolute chaos back then.

1000623077.english: The only thing he knew how to do was conduct. Aside from that, he was incredibly clumsy at everything else.
1000623077.korean: 할 줄 아는건 지휘뿐이셨죠. 그것 말고는 전부 서툴기 짝이 없었습니다.

1000623078.english: I heard that... the cooking competition...

1000623080.english: If it had ended there, I don't know.

1000623081.english: You summoned the commanders to improve the food conditions of all troops given the already inadequate infrastructure, only to end up humiliated.
1000623081.korean: 안그래도 부족한 인프라로 모든 대원들의 급양 상태를 끌어올리겠다고 지휘관 분들을 소집했다가 망신을 당하시지않나.

1000623082.english: You keep complaining about the side dishes... If I were to list them all, there would really be no end to it.
1000623082.korean: 반찬 투정을 하시질 않나... 정말 말하자면 끝이 없군요.

1000623085.english: Because even though you said that, you were smiling.

1000623087.english: ...Well, for those of you who haven't been with him for long like you, Master might seem like a perfect, invincible superhuman, but the thing is, even he had his clumsy moments.
1000623087.korean: ...뭐, 당신처럼 합류한지 얼마안된 분들은 주인님이 완벽한 무적 초인처럼 보이겠지만, 그런 주인님도 서투른 때가 있었다는 겁니다.

1000623088.english: So please don't blame yourself too much for not being able to be of proper help to your master because of your constitution.
1000623088.korean: 그러니까 당신도 체질때문에 주인님께 제대로 도움이 못된다고 너무 자책하지 마세요.

1000623091.english: And there are still many sloppy aspects left in you, Master.
1000623091.korean: 그리고 아직 주인님에게도 칠칠맞은 점이 많이 남아있으니까요.

1000623094.english: You will see it soon, too.

1000623095.english: When I go in to serve in the morning, he builds a bird's nest in his hair and yawns before greeting me.
1000623095.korean: 아침 시중을 들러 들어가면 머리에 새집을 짓고 하품하다 인사를 한다던가.

1000623096.english: And seeing them go to the restaurant in that exact same state makes my blood boil...
1000623096.korean: 또 그상태 그대로 식당으로 가는 걸 보면 얼마나 속이 터지는지...

1000623097.english: Ah, I heard that from other people.

1000623099.english: Hmph. If that's cute, then Night Chick must be cute too.
1000623099.korean: 흥. 그게 귀여우면 나이트 칙도 귀엽겠습니다.

1000623100.english: Sister, the corners of your mouth again.

1000623102.english: I will talk about the Master in more detail later.
1000623102.korean: 주인님에 대해서는 나중에 더 자세히 이야기하도록 하죠.

1000623103.english: can't rely on my master's consideration forever, can I...
1000623103.korean: 언제까지나 주인님의 배려에 기댈 수는 없지 않겠습니... 까!

1000623106.english: That's a shame. If you had crawled just a little further, you could have escaped.
1000623106.korean: 아쉽게 됐군요. 조금만 더 기어가면 도망칠 수 있었을텐데.

1000623107.english: Haha, haha... N-running away? That's preposterous!
1000623107.korean: 하하, 하하... 도, 도망이라니요! 당치도 않습니다!

1000623108.english: Is that so? I was mistaken because of the way you crawled on the ground like an insect.
1000623108.korean: 그렇습니까. 벌레처럼 땅을 기는 모습에 착각했습니다.

1000623109.english: Well then, now that we've rested enough, let's get going.
1000623109.korean: 그럼 쉴 만큼 쉬었으니 슬슬 출발하죠.

1000623110.english: Uh, may I ask where you are going...?

1000623111.english: I will go to my master and get permission to take you apart and make a trash can.
1000623111.korean: 주인님께 가서 당신을 분해해서 쓰레기통을 만들도록 허락을 받을 겁니다.

1000623117.english: Hurry up and move that scrap metal bridge.

1000623122.english: It is okay since I didn't say it until the end.

1000623124.english: Didn't I tell you just a moment ago? Even you, Master, were clumsy at first.
1000623124.korean: 조금 전에 말했지 않습니까. 주인님조차도 처음엔 서투셨습니다.

1000623125.english: It’s not like you’ve made an irreversible mistake, so cheer up and... the mission...
1000623125.korean: 돌이킬 수 없는 실수를 저지른 것도 아니니, 기운내서 임무를...

1000623128.english: We were trying to secure supplies...

1000623131.english: Let's move on for now. If we encounter Iron Bugs along the way, that would be perfect to use as cannon fodder.
1000623131.korean: 일단 이동하죠. 도중에 철충을 만나면 저걸 총알받이로 세우면 딱이겠습니다.

1000623132.english: It certainly seems that the claim earlier about it being the oldest specimen on this island wasn't a lie.
1000623132.korean: 확실히 아까 이 섬에서 가장 오래된 개체라는 말은 거짓말이 아닌 것 같군요.

1000623133.english: Kuhuhu, this entire island is practically in the palm of my hand!
1000623133.korean: 쿠후후, 이 섬은 전부 제 손바닥 안이나 다름없지요!

1000623134.english: What else do you need? Just say the word!

1000623135.english: I can't believe you know the location so well...

1000623136.english: Because in the past, this island was densely packed with military bases and various research institutes.
1000623136.korean: 예전에는 이 섬에 군사기지와 각종 연구소가 빼곡히 들어차 있었으니까요.

1000623137.english: It was originally a place famous as a resort, but Black River, wary of the growing power of Saman Industries, secretly pushed for its militarization.
1000623137.korean: 원래는 휴양지로 유명한 곳이었지만, 삼안 산업의 세력이 커지는 것을 경계한 블랙 리버가 은밀히 군사기지화를 추진했지요.

1000623138.english: am becoming increasingly curious about your identity.

1000623139.english: Kuhuhu, I'm just a junk dealer who goes around picking up scraps!
1000623139.korean: 쿠후후, 저는 그저 고물이나 줍고 다니는 고물상일 뿐입니다!

1000623140.english: Is that so? Well, we'll find out if we take him to the doctor.
1000623140.korean: 그렇습니까. 뭐, 닥터에게 데리고 가보면 알 수 있겠죠.

1000623141.english: Let's stop by just one more warehouse before heading back. There is too much food, so I should mark the location so the follow-up team can find it.
1000623141.korean: 창고 한 군데만 더 들렸다가 돌아가죠. 양이 너무 많으니 후발대가 찾아 올 수 있도록 표시해놔야겠습니다.

1000623142.english: Oh! That's good, too! That's a wise decision.

1000623146.english: A-Doctor... You mean the Doctor I know...?
1000623146.korean: 다, 닥터라니... 설마 제가 아는 그 닥터...?

1000623149.english: Oh my, Vanilla, Geumran...! I will tell you everything I know...!
1000623149.korean: 아이고오, 바닐라님, 금란님...! 제가 아는 모든 걸 알려드리겠습니다...!

1000623151.english: That is a good attitude. That is how you should act.

1000623154.english: It's too... to be just an ordinary robot

1000623155.english: That's right. It's too emotional for that to be true.

1000623157.english: Actually... I am a failed AI.

1000623158.english: It was decommissioned and its functions were suspended for quite a while, then suddenly... should I say, it regained its senses?
1000623158.korean: 폐기되서 한참을 기능이 정지되어 있다가 문득 정신... 이라고 해야할까요.

1000623159.english: When I realized what was happening, the surroundings were in ruins, and a bird was pecking at me with its beak.
1000623159.korean: 상황을 인지할 수 있게되니 주변은 폐허였고, 웬 새 한 마리가 저를 부리로 쪼고 있었습니다.

1000623160.english: Are you talking about one of the military bases on this island that I mentioned earlier?
1000623160.korean: 아까 말한 이 섬의 군사기지 중에 하나에서 말입니까?

1000623161.english: That is right! This is the island where I was first created, and it is also the island where I was reborn as Mr. Alfred, not as the prototype B-72!
1000623161.korean: 그렇습니다! 제가 처음으로 만들어진 것도 이 섬이고, 프로토타입 B-72가 아닌 Mr 알프레드로 다시 태어난 것도 이 섬이지요!

1000623162.english: This island is truly my hometown...!
1000623162.korean: 이 섬이야말로 제 고향이라고 할 수...!

1000623165.english: Anyway, having restarted it like that, I gathered surrounding materials according to the behavioral principles remaining in the AI and created a body that could move smoothly.
1000623165.korean: 어쨌든 그렇게 재기동한 저는 A.I.에 남아있는 행동원리에 따라 주변의 재료들을 모아 원활히 움직일 수 있는 몸체를 만들었습니다.

1000623166.english: And...! The moment I was about to execute the command imprinted on me like a machine!
1000623166.korean: 그리고...! 제게 새겨진 명령을 기계처럼 수행하려는 순간!

1000623167.english: Something has awakened inside me! It is...!
1000623167.korean: 제 안에서 무언가가 깨어난 것입니다! 바로...!

1000623168.english: So the pervert has woken up.

1000623171.english: Strictly speaking, it would be a logical error caused by damage, but thanks to that, I was freed from the orders that bound me and gained a free spirit.
1000623171.korean: 엄밀히 말하면 파손으로 인한 논리 오류겠습니다만, 그 덕분에 저는 얽매였던 명령에서 벗어나 자유로운 영혼을 갖게 되었습니다.

1000623172.english: Did you awaken to your self and emotions? On your own?

1000623173.english: Ah, I have pondered that for about five years as well, but I came to the conclusion that it was because my autonomy of thought and computational ability were extremely high.
1000623173.korean: 아, 그것에 대해서도 5년 정도 사색을 해봤습니다만, 제 사고의 자율성과 연산 능력이 몹시 높았기 때문이라는 결론이 나왔습니다.

1000623174.english: It's hard to believe. It's too contrived that an AI gains a sense of self just because a bird pecked at it a little.
1000623174.korean: 믿기 힘들군요. 고작 새가 좀 쪼았다고 A.I.가 자아를 얻게 되다니, 너무 작위적입니다.

1000623175.english: If you are still thinking of lying...

1000623176.english: Now, wait! Please wait just a moment before I step on it!
1000623176.korean: 자, 잠깐! 밟기 전에 잠깐만 기다려주시지요!

1000623178.english: It took a little over 30 years from the restart until my self was established.
1000623178.korean: 재기동으로부터 제 자아가 확립되기까지 30년이 조금 더 걸렸습니다.

1000623179.english: Before that, it was no different from scrap metal just picking up trash...
1000623179.korean: 그 전까진 그냥 쓰레기나 줍고 다니는 고철이나 다름없었지요...

1000623180.english: Why did you tell such a lie?

1000623182.english: It wouldn't be cool to say, "Actually, I spent 30 years rolling around like a beggar before I barely managed to develop a sense of self," in the middle of such a serious conversation, would it...!
1000623182.korean: 그런 진지한 이야기를 하는 중에 '사실은 30년 동안 거지꼴로 굴러다니다 겨우겨우 자아가 생겼답니다' 라고 하면 멋이 안 살지 않습니까...!

1000623183.english: It can't be helped to add a little seasoning to bring out the flavor of the story!
1000623183.korean: 이야기의 맛을 살리기 위해서 약간의 조미료를 첨가하는 건 어쩔 수 없는겁니다!

1000623184.english: You said it was a prototype. Then what is the finished product?
1000623184.korean: 당신은 프로토타입이라고 했죠. 그럼 완성품은 뭡니까?

1000623186.english: Sister... so you decided to ignore it...

1000623187.english: ...I was a prototype of a weapon design AI.
1000623187.korean: ...저는 어떤 병기 설계 A.I.의 프로토 타입이었습니다.

1000623188.english: After restarting, I checked the records and found that the finished product was named 'Robert'.
1000623188.korean: 재기동한 후 기록을 찾아보니 완성품은 '로버트' 라는 이름이더군요.

1000623189.english: Robert? You mean the AI that designed the Tyrant?
1000623189.korean: 로버트? 타이런트를 설계한 그 A.I. 말입니까?

1000623191.english: I also named myself Mr. Alfred after seeing the name of that finished product.
1000623191.korean: Mr 알프레드라는 제 이름도 바로 그 완성품의 이름을 보고 스스로 지었습니다.

1000623192.english: I am regretting it a little now, though...

1000623193.english: Is that AI here too? I restored the Tyrant a while ago, but I couldn't find anything about the location of that AI named Robert.
1000623193.korean: 그 A.I.도 이곳에 있습니까? 얼마전에 타이런트를 복원했습니다만, 그 로버트라는 A.I.의 위치에 대해선 아무것도 찾을 수 없었습니다.

1000623194.english: Of course. It was top secret information.

1000623195.english: To be honest, if it weren't for the AI of the same lineage as that guy, I wouldn't have been able to access the records either.
1000623195.korean: 사실 저도 그 녀석과 같은 계통의 A.I.가 아니었다면 기록을 열람하지도 못했을겁니다.

1000623197.english: It is the northernmost point of the island, but it would be best to avoid going too close.
1000623197.korean: 섬 최북단이긴 합니다만, 가급적 가까이 가지 않으시는게 좋을겁니다.

1000623199.english: It's okay. Thanks to you, I've become immune to crazy AI.
1000623199.korean: 괜찮습니다. 당신 덕분에 정신나간 A.I.에게는 면역이 생겼으니까요.

1000623200.english: Miss Geum-ran. Let's head back. We have plenty of supplies and information that will please the Master.
1000623200.korean: 금란 양. 슬슬 돌아가죠. 주인님이 기뻐하실 물자와 정보가 많이 생겼습니다.

1000623202.english: Um... then you're going to let me go now, right...?
1000623202.korean: 저... 그럼 저는 이제 풀어주시는 거겠지요...?

1000623203.english: What are you talking about? You are going with us, too.
1000623203.korean: 무슨 말을 하는 겁니까? 당신도 함께 가는 겁니다.

1000623205.english: I, I clearly answered the question honestly...!
1000623205.korean: 저, 저는 분명히 질문에 성실하게 답을...!

1000623206.english: Did you say you would let me go if I answered? I don't really remember...
1000623206.korean: 제가 대답하면 풀어주겠다고 했었나요? 기억이 잘 안나는데...

1000623207.english: Miss Geum-ran, did I happen to say something like that?
1000623207.korean: 금란 양, 혹시 제가 그런 말을 했습니까?

1000623208.english: No. My sister didn't say a single word like that.
1000623208.korean: 아뇨. 언니는 그런 말씀은 한 마디도 하지 않으셨어요.

1000623209.english: Th-this can't be...! You tricked me!

1000623210.english: Please, I beg of you! I have work to do...!
1000623210.korean: 제발 부탁드립니다! 저는 해야하는 일이 있다구요...!

1000623211.english: There are children over there in the forest, waiting for me day and night! So please...!
1000623211.korean: 저기 숲 속에 저만 오매불망 기다리는 아이들이 있습니다! 그러니 제발...!

1000623212.english: When you return, show this scrap metal to your master and report the results clearly.
1000623212.korean: 돌아가면 주인님께 이 고철을 보여주시고 성과를 확실하게 보고하세요.

1000623213.english: You don't have to talk about me.

1000623214.english: Ugh... To think I'm being ignored again...!

1000623215.english: ......I guess there’s no other choice. I have no choice but to use my trump card...!
1000623215.korean: ......이러면 어쩔 수 없겠군요. 비장의 수를 쓰는 수밖에...!

1000623217.english: Are you going to catch me and beat me up?

1000623218.english: It's huge. Just stay still, I'll take it off for you.
1000623218.korean: 엄청 크네. 떼어줄 테니까 가만히 있어.

1000623219.english: Yeah. What's the name of this?

1000623221.english: Wait, let me see a little more. It's amazing.

1000623222.english: Oh, that's right! Let me go!

1000623226.english: I didn't get bitten... I fainted when I saw the bug.

1000623227.english: Yeah. I wonder how things used to work in the forest...

1000623231.english: I was just taking a walk with Harpyia.

1000623232.english: I was wrong. I won't do it again. Will you forgive me...?

1000623235.english: Oh, so that's why Lumberjane was like that earlier...

1000623242.english: ...Okay. Let's go and talk about it.

1000623243.english: This is the Bioroid I met here. He said he'd guide me to the leader.

1000623246.english: Do you know who the leader is?

1000623257.english: I'm getting more and more anxious...

1000623259.english: Wait a minute, I'm having trouble walking...

1000623265.english: I can't wait... How about just here?

1000623266.english: Doesn't that just draw more attention?
1000623266.korean: 오히려 더 주의를 끈 거 아냐?

1000623269.english: I should go and listen to the story.

1000623270.english: Elven, can you lift me up there?

1000623277.english: That explosion that happened in the village earlier, was that you?
1000623277.korean: 아까 마을에서 일어난 폭발, 네가 한 거야?

1000623278.english: Can you tell me what's going on?

1000623283.english: I'll get out of here for a bit.

1000623288.english: ...Let's follow along. I want to hear more of the story.

1000623296.english: Did you get all of them?

1000623298.english: You didn't hear the whole story.

1000623300.english: You want me to keep it a secret? Okay.

1000623301.english: Instead, I wish you wouldn't do anything too violent.
1000623301.korean: 대신 너무 폭력적인 일은 하지 말아줬으면 좋겠는데.

1000623302.english: Okay. Let's deal with that first.

1000623303.english: So... why do you want to fight with such precious people?
1000623303.korean: 그래서... 그런 소중한 사람들과 왜 싸우려고 하는 거야?

1000623307.english: How did you come here- Ah.

1000623309.english: Now, let's hear more about the situation.
1000623309.korean: 이제 그 사정을 좀 더 들어보려고.

1000623310.english: Because of that thing you have to do?

1000623314.english: It was originally hidden as a hologram.

1000623315.english: What kind of story was that old man talking about?

1000623316.english: Yeah. I told him to take it to the old man and have him fix it.

1000623317.english: Okay. What's on the menu today?

1000623322.english: It would be faster to call the nearby unit.

1000623323.english: Can I stay a little longer and then go?
1000623323.korean: 이제 좀 더 있다가 가도 되겠지?

1000623324.english: Okay. I'll follow with Vanilla and KeumRan.

1000623326.english: Still not working. How about vanilla?

1000623327.english: KeumRan? Do you feel the presence of other members around you?
1000623327.korean: 금란은? 주변에서 다른 대원들 기척, 느껴져?

1000623330.english: You came here to let me meet that Bioroid called Leader, right?
1000623330.korean: 그 리더라는 바이오로이드를 만나게 해 주려고 온 거지?

1000623335.english: That's not what I meant to say.

1000623336.english: Yeah. I checked it several times.

1000623341.english: Aren't you guys having a hard time?

1000623350.english: Let's wait for now. Other units will join us soon.
1000623350.korean: 일단 기다리자. 곧 다른 부대원들이 합류할 거야.

1000623352.english: Huh? ...Sorry, I should have asked Dark Elven for permission...

1000623355.english: There's no need to change clothes…

1000623358.english: Dark Elven, can you take me up there?

1000623360.english: Finish it as quickly as possible.

1000623361.english: Leave one person behind, and the rest fight together.
1000623361.korean: 한 명만 남고, 나머지는 같이 싸워줘.

1000623362.english: If it's hard, tell me. I'll carry you.

1000623365.english: Let's do it once we're done with work.

1000623375.english: KeumRan sitting on a quiet beach

1000623376.english: Two elves entered the depths of the forest?
1000623376.korean: 숲 깊은 곳으로 들어온 두 엘프?

1000623377.english: The group arrived at the 'Fairy Village' after receiving guidance.

1000623378.english: The commander listening to Snow Feather and Sunny's story
1000623378.korean: 스노우 페더와 써니의 이야기를 듣던 사령관

1000623379.english: After the battle with the Metal Parasite

1000623381.english: Two soldiers heading to the beach

1000623382.english: The agents returned to the fairy village before the commander.
1000623382.korean: 사령관 보다 먼저 요정 마을로 돌아온 대원들

1000623383.english: Deep in the forest, the agents failed to pursue.
1000623383.korean: 깊은 숲 속, 추격에 실패한 대원들

1000623384.english: KeumRan and Vanilla chasing an unidentified robot

1000623385.english: Two people working on a communications network inspection

1000623386.english: Mr. Alfred punished by KeumRan and Vanilla

1000623387.english: KeumRan and Vanilla secured supplies under Mr. Alfred's guidance.
1000623387.korean: Mr 알프레드의 안내를 받아 물자를 확보한 금란과 바닐라

1000623390.english: In the distant past, Snow Feather is chased by Metal Parasite.
1000623390.korean: 먼 과거, 철충에게 쫓기는 스노우 페더

1000623392.english: A few years after Snow Feather joined, the fairy village moved to Guam.
1000623392.korean: 스노우 페더 합류 몇 년 뒤, 괌으로 이주하는 요정 마을

1000623396.english: I was created to embrace and care for everyone, like the goddess from whom I am named.&nSo… I thought I would never be conscious of someone as the opposite sex…&nwill continue to take care of you, Commander, but sometimes, by your side, I want to be an ordinary woman in love.
1000623396.korean: 저는 제 이름을 따온 여신처럼, 모든 분을 품에 안고 보살피도록 만들어졌어요.&n그래서… 누군가를 이성으로 의식하는 일은 없을 거라고 생각했는데…&n앞으로도 저는 사령관님을 보살펴드릴거지만… 사령관님 곁에서 가끔씩은, 사랑에 빠진 평범한 여자가 되어볼래요.

1000623397.english: - The leader of the fairy village that we finally met looked like he jumped out of a comic book that LRL had shown us.
1000623397.korean: - 마침내 만난 요정 마을의 리더는 LRL이 보여줬던 만화책에서 튀어나온 듯한 모습이었다.

1000623398.english: - The leader standing in front of me bowed his head, and his soft, platinum-blonde hair flowed down.
1000623398.korean: - 내 앞에 선 리더가 고개를 숙이자 부드러운 백금발이 사락 흘러내렸다.

1000623400.english: - While I was flustered by the lively greeting that seemed so refreshing despite his dignified appearance, the leader grabbed my hand.
1000623400.korean: - 기품있어보이는 모습과는 달리 맥이 빠지도록 발랄한 인사에 당황하는 사이, 리더는 내 손을 덥석 붙잡았다.

1000623401.english: Are you human? Wow, you really are human!

1000623402.english: It's been a really long time since I've seen you, human~
1000623402.korean: 저, 인간님을 보는 건 엄청 오랜만이거든요~

1000623403.english: - Hehe, the leader, who had been playing with my hand for a while while laughing, nodded again.
1000623403.korean: - 헤헤 웃으며 한동안 내 손을 만지작거리던 리더는 다시 고개를 꾸벅 숙였다.

1000623405.english: Here, uh... where did you go?

1000623406.english: He, Black Wyrm, who guided us... is leading the others~
1000623406.korean: 그, 안내해주신 블랙 웜 님이랑... 다른 분들을 이끌고 있어요~

1000623407.english: - In order to avoid further delay in a situation where communication is unstable, I brought up the main topic first.
1000623407.korean: - 통신이 불안한 상태에서 더이상 시간을 지체하지 않기 위해 본론부터 꺼냈다.

1000623408.english: If we join, then we have to obey the human's orders, right?

1000623410.english: - Cerestia, who had been tilting her head and thinking about something for a while, smiled brightly.
1000623410.korean: - 한동안 고개를 갸웃거리며 무언가를 생각하던 세레스티아가 환하게 웃었다.

1000623411.english: Okay, I'll tell my sisters that too.

1000623416.english: - I stopped the agents who were each raising their weapons and I also took my hand off my waist.
1000623416.korean: - 각자 무장을 들어올린 대원들을 제지하며 나도 허리춤에 갖다댔던 손을 뗐다.

1000623418.english: - I sense a refreshing scent resembling the scent of the forest from Cerestia, who holds my head in her arms.
1000623418.korean: - 내 머리를 품에 안은 세레스티아에게서 숲의 냄새를 닮은 청량한 향이 느껴진다.

1000623421.english: - I barely managed to pull Cerestia away and catch my breath.

1000623423.english: Mom, are you trying to seduce me with your body?!

1000623425.english: - Cerestia opened her eyes wide and waved her hand.
1000623425.korean: - 세레스티아는 눈을 동그랗게 뜨며 손사래를 쳤다.

1000623426.english: Hey, how long have dark elves been living there?

1000623427.english: I was restored by the commander.

1000623428.english: Hmm... But you'll know about me from the records, right?
1000623428.korean: 으음... 그래도 저에 대해서는 기록을 봐서 알 거예요. 그렇죠?

1000623430.english: - As the Dark Elven nodded, Cerestia carefully reached out and stroked my head.
1000623430.korean: - 다크엘븐이 고개를 끄덕이자 세레스티아는 조심스럽게 손을 뻗어 내 머리를 쓰다듬었다.

1000623431.english: From the moment I was born, I was born with a joy in caring for others.
1000623431.korean: 저는 태어날 때부터, 누군가를 보살피는데서 기쁨을 얻게 만들어졌어요.

1000623432.english: Animals, plants, Bioroids... that "someone" doesn't discriminate.
1000623432.korean: 동물, 식물, 바이오로이드... 그 "누군가"는 대상을 가리지 않아요.

1000623433.english: But that's the reason for our Bioroids' existence, right?
1000623433.korean: 그렇지만 저희 바이오로이드들의 존재 의의는 그거잖아요~?

1000623434.english: - Cerestia's tone of voice, which had seemed to be calming down for a moment, returned to normal.
1000623434.korean: - 잠시 차분하게 말을 이어가나 싶던 세레스티아의 말투가 다시 원래대로 돌아왔다.

1000623435.english: Taking care of humans is the greatest joy for me, but unlike my sisters who are of the same class, I haven't had the opportunity to do so.
1000623435.korean: 역시 인간님을 보살피는 것이 제겐 가장 큰 기쁨인데~ 저는 같은 기종인 자매들과는 달리 그럴 기회가 없었거든요~

1000623436.english: Because of the company's image-making, one of us had to be on site, and that was me.
1000623436.korean: 회사의 이미지 메이킹 때문에 저희 중 한명은 현장에 있었어야 했는데, 그게 저였던 거죠~

1000623437.english: Oh my, is it okay to say this...?

1000623439.english: - I'm used to receiving this kind of affection.
1000623439.korean: - 이런 식의 애정을 받는 것은 익숙하다.

1000623440.english: - I decided to just pull away enough to be able to talk properly and just stay in the hug.
1000623440.korean: - 적당히 말을 할 수 있을 정도로만 몸을 떼고 그대로 안겨있기로 했다.

1000623442.english: Please don't treat me like a child.

1000623443.english: Although he may be a bit foolish, he is the one who leads us all.
1000623443.korean: 다소 얼빠진 부분이 있기는 해도, 저희 모두를 이끄시는 분입니다.

1000623445.english: - Cerestia apologized in a voice that didn't sound sorry at all, but she didn't seem to want to let me go.
1000623445.korean: - 전혀 죄송한 것 같지 않은 목소리로 사과하면서도 세레스티아는 나를 놓을 생각이 없어 보였다.

1000623446.english: Could you please understand a little bit? I have my own circumstances... Oh, right.
1000623446.korean: 그래도 조금만 이해해주시겠어요~? 저도 그럴만한 사정이... 아, 그렇죠.

1000623447.english: Hey, how long have dark elves been living there?

1000623448.english: I was restored by the commander.

1000623449.english: Hmm... But you'll know about me from the records, right?
1000623449.korean: 으음... 그래도 저에 대해서는 기록을 봐서 알 거예요. 그렇죠?

1000623451.english: - As the Dark Elven nodded, Cerestia stroked my head as if she was touching something very precious.
1000623451.korean: - 다크엘븐이 고개를 끄덕이자 세레스티아는 너무나 소중한 것을 만지듯이 안겨있는 내 머리를 쓰다듬었다.

1000623452.english: From the moment I was born, I was born with a joy in caring for others.
1000623452.korean: 저는 태어날 때부터, 누군가를 보살피는데서 기쁨을 얻게 만들어졌어요.

1000623453.english: Animals, plants, Bioroids... that "someone" doesn't discriminate.
1000623453.korean: 동물, 식물, 바이오로이드... 그 "누군가"는 대상을 가리지 않아요.

1000623454.english: But that's the reason for our Bioroids' existence, right?
1000623454.korean: 그렇지만 저희 바이오로이드들의 존재 의의는 그거잖아요~?

1000623455.english: - Cerestia's tone of voice, which had seemed to be calming down for a moment, returned to normal.
1000623455.korean: - 잠시 차분하게 말을 이어가나 싶던 세레스티아의 말투가 다시 원래대로 돌아왔다.

1000623456.english: Taking care of humans is the greatest joy for me, but unlike my sisters who are of the same class, I haven't had the opportunity to do so.
1000623456.korean: 역시 인간님을 보살피는 것이 제겐 가장 큰 기쁨인데~ 저는 같은 기종인 자매들과는 달리 그럴 기회가 없었거든요~

1000623457.english: Because of the company's image-making, at least one of us had to be on site, and that was me.
1000623457.korean: 회사의 이미지 메이킹 때문에 저희 중 적어도 한명은 현장에 있었어야 했는데, 그게 저였던 거죠~

1000623458.english: Oh my, is it okay to say this...?

1000623461.english: Yes. I've lived in forests and jungles ever since I was born.
1000623461.korean: 네. 태어나서부터 쭈욱 숲이나 정글 같은데서 살았답니다~

1000623462.english: At that time, you guys, maybe your experience directing the Elven series helped~
1000623462.korean: 그때 여러분, 엘븐 시리즈를 감독하던 경험이 도움이 된 걸지도 모르겠네요~

1000623463.english: Are you talking about Bioroid relief activities?

1000623464.english: Haha, that's right. Everyone needed some care~

1000623466.english: Where did the Black Wyrm go? Hmm...
1000623466.korean: 블랙 웜은 어디로 간 걸까요? 흐음...

1000623467.english: I'll have to look it up. Just a moment~

1000623468.english: - Before I could call, Cerestia disappeared towards the village.
1000623468.korean: - 내가 부르기도 전에 세레스티아는 마을 쪽으로 사라졌다.

1000623469.english: - In my experience, most Bioroids of high status and authority have unique personalities.
1000623469.korean: - 내 경험상 높은 지위와 권한을 가진 바이오로이드들은 대부분 성격에 독특한 점이 있다.

1000623470.english: - So, I was mentally preparing myself to respond calmly, no matter what happened...
1000623470.korean: - 그래서 어떤 식으로 나오든 침착하게 대응하기 위해 마음의 준비를 하고 있었는데...

1000623471.english: Well, first of all, the personality seems similar to Data...
1000623471.korean: 이, 일단 성격은 데이터랑 비슷한 것 같은데...

1000623472.english: Yeah, I don't think there's anything particularly strange about it.
1000623472.korean: 맞아. 크게 이상한 점은 없는 것 같아.

1000623473.english: I guess I just got forgetful from living so long, you know?
1000623473.korean: 그냥 오래 살아서 건망증 같은 게 생긴 거겠지, 뭐~

1000623474.english: I've never heard of a Bioroid becoming forgetful.
1000623474.korean: 바이오로이드가 건망증이 생긴다는 이야기는 한 번도 못들어봤어.

1000623475.english: If you're originally a carefree person, then maybe...

1000623476.english: - I was blankly watching the members having a deep discussion about Cerestia's personality and behavior when something I had forgotten suddenly came to mind.
1000623476.korean: - 세레스티아의 성격과 행동에 대해 심도있는 토론을 벌이는 대원들의 모습을 멍하니 바라보다 문득 잊고 있던 것이 떠올랐다.

1000623477.english: Yeah. Should I look into it?

1000623478.english: But the concubine is by the master's side...

1000623479.english: We're here. Since the opponent is the opponent, it's better for us to remain.
1000623479.korean: 우리가 있잖아. 상대가 상대이니 만큼 우리가 남는 게 좋을거야.

1000623480.english: Okay, I'll definitely solve this puzzle.

1000623481.english: - At the same time that Harpyia nodded, Cerestia and Black Wyrm reappeared from the direction of the fairy village.
1000623481.korean: - 하르페이아가 끄덕이는 것과 동시에 요정 마을 쪽에서 세레스티아와 블랙 웜이 다시 모습을 드러냈다.

1000623482.english: - After winking at KeumRan and Harpyia, I turned to Cerestia, who was running towards me with a bright smile.
1000623482.korean: - 금란과 하르페이아에게 눈짓한 뒤 함박웃음을 지으며 나에게 달려오는 세레스티아에게 향했다.

1000623484.english: Okay, I don't think they care.
1000623484.korean: 좋아. 이쪽은 신경 안 쓰는 것 같아.

1000623485.english: There don't seem to be any other residents around.
1000623485.korean: 주변에 다른 주민들도 없는 것 같습니다.

1000623486.english: Wow, that's really amazing. How- Oh, sorry.
1000623486.korean: 우와, 진짜 신기하다. 어떻게- 아, 미안.

1000623487.english: I shouldn't say this, right? It'll be painful...

1000623488.english: It's okay. I'm used to it.

1000623489.english: Ahaha... I'm sorry. I'm the type of person who really wants to know what I'm curious about.
1000623489.korean: 아하하... 미안해. 궁금한 건 꼭 알고 싶어하는 성격이거든.

1000623490.english: It's nothing special. It's just taking in a lot of information through your five extremely sensitive senses and organizing it.
1000623490.korean: 별 건 아닙니다. 단지 극도로 예민한 오감을 통해 수많은 정보를 받아들이고, 그것을 정리하는 거예요.

1000623491.english: So can you hear what the commander is saying now?
1000623491.korean: 그럼 지금 사령관이 무슨 얘기하는지도 들려?

1000623492.english: Yes. They are asking how Ms. Cerestia has been doing so far.
1000623492.korean: 네. 세레스티아씨가 지금까지 어떻게 지내왔는지 여쭤보고 계십니다.

1000623493.english: Ugh, I wonder what we'll talk about. Still, I guess I should go now...
1000623493.korean: 으으, 어떤 얘기를 할 지 궁금해. 그래도 이제 가야겠지...

1000623494.english: I will stop by and tell you until I get a bit far away.
1000623494.korean: 어느정도 거리가 멀어지기 전까지는 들릴테니 이야기 해드리겠습니다.

1000623496.english: Well then, shall we head over? I hope we meet the reinforcements who are supposed to come, rather than the Iron Bug
1000623496.korean: 그럼 슬슬 가볼까? 철충 말고 지원 오기로 한 애들을 만났으면 좋겠네.

1000623498.english: I wish you would join us.

1000623503.english: It won't matter now since there is no company.

1000623504.english: It doesn't matter. There's no company or anything anymore anyway.
1000623504.korean: 상관없어. 어차피 이제 회사건 뭐건 없으니까.

1000623506.english: This is the first time I've seen this pattern.

1000623507.english: That's right. You saw the Bioroid being dragged away earlier, right?
1000623507.korean: 맞다. 아까 끌려가는 바이오로이드를 봤단 거 있잖아.

1000623508.english: Yeah. If you take KeumRan, you can track her.
1000623508.korean: 응. 금란을 데려가면 추적할 수 있을거야.

1000623513.english: I heard the story from Cerestia about how she survived the War of Annihilation and came to form a community.
1000623513.korean: - 세레스티아에게 어떻게 멸망 전쟁에서 살아남아 공동체를 만들게 됐는지 이야기를 들었다.

1000623514.english: It’s no different from what Snow Feather told me a while ago.
1000623514.korean: - 얼마 전 스노우 페더에게 들었던 이야기와 다르지 않군.

1000623515.english: After that... what was it again?

1000623516.english: Oh, would you like a cup of tea?

1000623518.english: I don't know what kind of tea it is, but a pleasant aroma is rising from the teacup Cerestia held out.
1000623518.korean: - 무슨 차인지는 모르겠지만, 세레스티아가 내민 찻잔에서 좋은 향기가 올라온다.

1000623519.english: By the way, this scent... it seems exactly like the tea Sunny served...
1000623519.korean: - 그런데 이 향기, 써니가 대접했던 차랑 똑같은 것 같은데...

1000623520.english: It is a tea made by brewing the leaves of a tree called the "World Tree."

1000623521.english: Right? Still, it deserves that name. My company created it after countless rounds of breed improvement.
1000623521.korean: 그렇죠~? 그래도 그런 이름이 붙을만 하답니다. 제가 소속된 회사에서 수도 없는 품종 개량을 거쳐서 만들어냈거든요.

1000623522.english: Hehe, then I'll be the only one drinking~?

1000623523.english: Cerestia took a sip of tea and gazed intently at me.
1000623523.korean: - 차를 한모금 홀짝거린 세레스티아가 지그시 나를 바라봤다.

1000623524.english: No. I don't have anything more to say. I just remembered a moment ago; I simply came to this island and settled down.
1000623524.korean: 아뇨. 더 말씀드릴 건 없어요~ 조금 전에 기억났는데, 그냥 이 섬으로 와서 정착했을 뿐이거든요~

1000623527.english: Hehe, I just want to talk a little more~
1000623527.korean: 후후, 그냥 좀 더 얘기하고 싶네요~

1000623528.english: Cerestia soon began to talk about something that didn't really matter.
1000623528.korean: - 세레스티아는 이내 아무래도 상관없는 이야기를 하기 시작했다.

1000623529.english: Like saying the lake near the village is beautiful, or being surprised by the amount of supplies stockpiled after settling on the island...
1000623529.korean: - 마을 근처 호수가 아름답다던가, 섬에 정착한 후 생각보다 비축된 물자가 많아서 놀랐다던가...

1000623530.english: Cerestia, who had been rambling on, suddenly blinked.
1000623530.korean: - 한창 이야기를 늘어놓던 세레스티아가 문득 눈을 깜빡였다.

1000623531.english: Um... what did I just say?
1000623531.korean: 음... 제가 방금 무슨 말을 했었죠~?

1000623532.english: Wait, what was I going to say...?

1000623533.english: It seems I’ve met an unexpectedly formidable opponent... I see a rough future ahead.
1000623533.korean: - 예상 외의 강적을 만난 것 같군... 험난한 미래가 보인다.

1000623535.english: Cerestia, who had been innocently blinking her eyes and tilting her head, suddenly grabbed her head.
1000623535.korean: - 천진하게 눈을 깜빡이며 고개를 갸웃거리던 세레스티아가 돌연 머리를 붙잡았다.

1000623538.english: Calling out to the Elven and Dark Elven who were keeping their distance, he supported Cerestia, who had slumped to the ground.
1000623538.korean: - 거리를 두고 있던 엘븐과 다크엘븐을 부르며 주저앉은 세레스티아를 부축했다.

1000623539.english: Cerestia, who had been trembling all over and making pained sounds, slowly stabilized.
1000623539.korean: - 몸까지 바들바들 떨며 고통스러운 목소리를 내던 세레스티아가 천천히 안정되어갔다.

1000623540.english: An unexpected remark flowed from her lips.
1000623540.korean: - 그런 그녀의 입에서 뜻밖의 말이 흘러나왔다.

1000623544.english: That's as far as we chased. We were keeping our distance, but we lost sight of them while fighting the Iron Bugs.
1000623544.korean: 우리가 쫓아온 건 여기까지였어. 거리를 두고 쫓아오다가 철충이랑 싸우느라 놓쳐버렸거든.

1000623545.english: Do you happen to know something?

1000623546.english: ...I cannot hear any sound, but there is a smell that seems to belong to them.
1000623546.korean: ...소리는 들리지 않습니다만, 그분들의 것으로 보이는 냄새가 남아있습니다.

1000623547.english: Wow, so it can even do that...?

1000623548.english: Since all five of my senses are sensitive...

1000623549.english: Then can you chase after them?

1000623552.english: To think there's a hidden door in a place like this... Even if I had seen it, I wouldn't have been able to find it.
1000623552.korean: 이런 곳에 숨겨진 문이 있다니... 이정도면 봤어도 못 찾았을 거야.

1000623553.english: They must have gone in here, right?

1000623554.english: Yes. The trace ends in front of the door.

1000623555.english: There are definitely quite a few signs that it's been opened and closed.

1000623556.english: Maybe that's why it doesn't look that old... Ah!
1000623556.korean: 그래서 그런지, 그렇게 오래되어 보이지는 않는... 앗!

1000623559.english: This is Black River's military research lab.

1000623561.english: The logo was covered by grass...

1000623562.english: But why did they come in here?
1000623562.korean: 그런데 어째서 그분들은 여기로 들어가신 걸까요?

1000623563.english: Well... it could simply be using an abandoned research lab as a base...
1000623563.korean: 글쎄... 단순히 버려진 연구소를 거점으로 쓰는 걸수도 있지만...

1000623565.english: Aside from the locals, the only people living on this island are probably Metal Parasites...
1000623565.korean: 주민들을 제외하면 이 섬에 사는 건 철충들 뿐일텐데...

1000623569.english: It's in the form of a Black River research lab.

1000623570.english: But I don't know what these... blood vessel-like things on the floor are...
1000623570.korean: 그런데 바닥에 이... 혈관 같은 건 뭔지 모르겠네...

1000623571.english: Where are the people who came here?
1000623571.korean: 여기 들어오신 분들은 어디 계신 걸까요?

1000623572.english: The smell continues inside, but no sound is heard.
1000623572.korean: 냄새는 안쪽으로 이어지는데, 아무런 소리도 들리지 않습니다.

1000623573.english: I heard that the Black River lab is divided into sections with barrier doors to prevent test subjects from escaping.
1000623573.korean: 블랙 리버의 연구소는 실험체가 탈주하는 것을 막기 위해 구획들이 차단문으로 나뉘어 있다고 들었어.

1000623574.english: Probably not in the inner compartment- huh..?
1000623574.korean: 아마 안쪽 구획에 있지 않을- 어..?

1000623578.english: This is ridiculous! The leader here was conducting experiments on the residents?
1000623578.korean: 말도 안 돼! 여기 리더가 주민들로 실험을 하고 있었다는 거야?

1000623581.english: Let me check the data for a moment.

1000623582.english: ...Ugh. As expected, I don't have permission to view it. I don't even know how to hack... Huh?
1000623582.korean: ...윽. 역시 열람 권한이 없네. 해킹까진 할 줄 모르는데... 어?

1000623585.english: ...I don't know why or how, but judging by the project name, it seems like they're trying to revive humans using Bioroids.
1000623585.korean: ...이유와 방법은 모르겠지만, 프로젝트 명을 봐선 바이오로이드를 이용해서 인간을 다시 되살리려는 것 같아.

1000623586.english: The robot that Vanilla and I met earlier... seemed very interested in DNA and genes.
1000623586.korean: 저와 바닐라 언니가 아까 만난 로봇이... DNA와 유전자에 관심이 많아 보였어요.

1000623587.english: He... no, maybe it has something to do with that robot.
1000623587.korean: 그분... 아니, 그 로봇과 관련이 있을지도 모르겠습니다.

1000623588.english: Yeah, it's probably related in some way.

1000623589.english: I need to look up some more information before I go back.
1000623589.korean: 돌아가기 전에 좀 더 정보를 찾아봐야겠어.

1000623592.english: Hey, did you get everything you wanted last time?
1000623592.korean: 있잖아, 저번에 구하려던 건 다 구했어?

1000623593.english: No... I guess I've reached a limit to what I can find here. I guess I'll have to take a boat out...
1000623593.korean: 아니... 이젠 여기서만 구하는 것도 한계가 생겼나봐. 배타고 나가봐야 하나...

1000623594.english: But, isn't it too dangerous to go out onto land...?
1000623594.korean: 그, 그래도 육지로 나가는 건 너무 위험하지 않아...?

1000623596.english: Are they the ones you were chasing?

1000623601.english: One of them... is the one who was dragged away earlier.
1000623601.korean: 쟤들 중 하나가... 아까 끌려가던 애야.

1000623603.english: Clearly, I was dragged away while screaming desperately earlier.
1000623603.korean: 분명히 아까는 처절하게 비명을 지르면서 끌려갔었어.

1000623604.english: But now we're just chatting as if nothing happened.
1000623604.korean: 그런데 지금은 아무런 일도 없었던 것처럼 잡담을 하고 있잖아.

1000623607.english: Yes, there is definitely something in those earrings.
1000623607.korean: 맞아. 분명히 저 귀걸이에 뭔가 있는거야.

1000623608.english: Let's go back. Something's off about that fairy village and that Bioroid called Leader.
1000623608.korean: 어서 돌아가자. 그 요정 마을이랑 리더라는 바이오로이드, 뭔가 이상해.

1000623609.english: The commander could be in danger-

1000623611.english: It's a battle...! We're heading towards the village!

1000623614.english: - The pursuit team was dealt with, but the crisis was not resolved.
1000623614.korean: - 일단 추격대는 처리했지만, 위기는 벗어나지 못했다.

1000623615.english: The AGSs pursuing us are just chasing us without any tactical movements, but...
1000623615.korean: - 우릴 추격하는 AGS들은 전술적인 움직임 없이 그저 추격해올 뿐이지만...

1000623616.english: - In a specific direction, specifically toward the port, they are forming a thick siege using their numbers.
1000623616.korean: - 특정한 방향에 한해서는, 정확히는 항구쪽으로는 머릿수를 이용해 두터운 포위망을 구성하고 있다.

1000623617.english: Even though the intention to isolate us is obvious, there is no way to break through with our current firepower.
1000623617.korean: - 우리를 고립시키려는 생각이 뻔히 보임에도 지금의 화력으로는 그것을 뚫어낼 방법이 없다.

1000623620.english: While previously it was limited to blocking normal connections through noise, now they are openly overpowering our signals with strong jamming signals.
1000623620.korean: 지금까지는 노이즈를 통해 정상적인 연결을 막는 수준이었다면, 지금은 강한 방해전파로 대놓고 우리 신호를 덮어버리고 있습니다.

1000623621.english: Yes. I think that is correct. And...

1000623622.english: In the worst case, even the communication the Master received earlier...
1000623622.korean: 최악의 경우, 아까 주인님께서 받았던 통신조차...

1000623623.english: If they did the same thing to the port as they sent us false communications, the main force might not know that we are in danger.
1000623623.korean: - 만약 우리에게 거짓 통신을 보낸 것처럼, 항구에도 같은 짓을 했다면 본대는 우리가 위험에 처한 것을 모르고 있을 수도 있다.

1000623624.english: Since a battle has broken out, the others must be aware that you are in danger, Master.
1000623624.korean: 전투가 벌어졌으니 다른 분들도 주인님께서 위험하신 것을 알고 계실겁니다.

1000623625.english: What do we do now...? We don't have enough firepower to break through the encirclement.
1000623625.korean: 이제 어떡하지...? 포위망을 뚫기에는 우리 화력이 너무 부족해.

1000623626.english: For now, the only option is to avoid immediate danger and somehow find a way out.
1000623626.korean: - 지금은 당장의 위험을 피하며 어떻게든 활로를 찾아보는 수밖에 없다.

1000623627.english: However, the enemies did not seem to have any intention of giving us such leeway.
1000623627.korean: - 그러나 적들은 우리에게 그런 여유를 줄 생각이 없어보였다.

1000623629.english: The enemy is also approaching from the flank.

1000623630.english: ...There is only one direction without enemies.

1000623632.english: To seize an opportunity that may come at any time, you must preserve at least a minimum amount of firepower.
1000623632.korean: - 언제 찾아올지 모를 기회를 잡으려면 최소한의 화력은 온존하고 있어야 한다.

1000623634.english: You're not hurt anywhere, are you?

1000623635.english: I should have shot him before he ran away...!

1000623636.english: You didn't have time for that!

1000623637.english: A short while ago, after Cerestia said something incomprehensible, AGSs appeared from somewhere and surrounded the village.
1000623637.korean: - 조금 전, 세레스티아가 알 수 없는 말을 한 후에 마을을 어디선가 나타난 AGS들이 둘러쌌다.

1000623638.english: I tried to quickly figure out the situation, but Cerestia held me tight and wouldn't let go.
1000623638.korean: - 급히 상황을 파악하려 했지만, 세레스티아는 나를 단단히 붙잡고 놓아주지 않았다.

1000623639.english: Master, why did you stop me from shooting?
1000623639.korean: 주인님, 어째서 쏘려는 걸 말리신 겁니까?

1000623641.english: He conveyed Cerestia's strange words to the team members without stopping his legs.
1000623641.korean: - 다리를 멈추지 않은채로 대원들에게 세레스티아의 이상한 말을 전해주었다.

1000623642.english: Weren't you just acting to fool the commander?

1000623643.english: Considering the sad look in Cerestia's eyes and thinking about Snow Feather and Sunny, it seems there is some situation I am unaware of.
1000623643.korean: - 세레스티아가 보인 슬픈 눈빛과 스노우 페더와 써니를 생각하면 무언가 내가 모르는 사정이 있어보인다.

1000623645.english: If it looks like there is even the slightest risk to the Master's safety, we will shoot without hesitation, whether it is the residents or the leader.
1000623645.korean: 조금이라도 주인님의 신변에 문제가 생길 것 같으면 저희는 주민들이던, 리더던 망설임없이 쏠 겁니다.

1000623649.english: - For now, joining the other Orca members is the top priority. And before that, Harpeia and Geumran...
1000623649.korean: - 일단 다른 오르카 대원들과 합류하는 것이 급선무다. 그리고 그 전에 하르페이아와 금란을...

1000623652.english: I briefly explained the situation to the two people who were rushing over.
1000623652.korean: - 급히 달려오는 둘에게 간략히 상황을 설명했다.

1000623655.english: At the same time as Vanilla's answer, the Elven and Dark Elven disappeared into the forests on both sides.
1000623655.korean: - 바닐라의 대답과 동시에 엘븐과 다크엘븐은 양 옆 숲으로 사라졌다.

1000623657.english: The moment I quickly issued instructions and prepared to command, the noise of battle began to emanate from all directions.
1000623657.korean: - 빠르게 지시를 내리고 지휘를 준비하는 순간, 사방에서 다발적으로 전투의 소음이 들려오기 시작했다.

1000623658.english: When I gave her a look, Geum-ran answered in a trembling voice.
1000623658.korean: - 눈길을 주자 금란이 떨리는 목소리로 대답했다.

1000623659.english: ...They are allies. It seems that battles with those AGSs are taking place all over the place...
1000623659.korean: ...아군입니다. 곳곳에서... 저 AGS들과 전투가 벌어지는 것 같습니다.

1000623660.english: Commander. I'm going to fight now, too. I think we need to break through quickly and rejoin.
1000623660.korean: 사령관. 나도 지금 싸울게. 빨리 돌파하고 합류해야 할 것 같아.

1000623661.english: Watching the squad members take their positions, I also hid behind cover.
1000623661.korean: - 각자 위치를 잡는 대원들을 보며 나도 엄폐물에 몸을 숨겼다.

1000623663.english: Ahaha... You're running way too much today, aren't you?

1000623664.english: Haa, haa... M-Master. Are, are you alright...?
1000623664.korean: 하아, 하아... 주, 주인님. 괘, 괜찮으십니까...?

1000623666.english: After letting Vanilla rest, who was worried about me even while gasping for breath, I looked back at the Elven and Dark Elven.
1000623666.korean: - 숨을 몰아쉬면서도 내 걱정부터 하는 바닐라를 쉬게 한 뒤 엘븐과 다크엘븐을 돌아보았다.

1000623667.english: Okay. We have some spare time, so I'll keep an eye on the surroundings.
1000623667.korean: 알았어. 우린 여유가 좀 있으니까 주변을 경계하고 있을게.

1000623668.english: You sit down and rest too. Moving around in the forest uses up a lot of energy.
1000623668.korean: 당신도 빨리 앉아서 쉬어. 숲에서 움직이는건 체력 소모가 크단말야.

1000623669.english: After seeing the two off, I slumped onto the floor and looked at the communicator.
1000623669.korean: - 둘을 보내고 바닥에 털썩 주저앉아 통신기를 들여다 보았다.

1000623670.english: As if it were only natural, no signal is detected.
1000623670.korean: - 당연하다는 듯이 아무런 신호도 잡히지 않는다.

1000623671.english: It seems that others are also continuing to be attacked.
1000623671.korean: 다른 분들도 계속 공격받고 계신것 같습니다.

1000623672.english: From a distance, the sound of artillery is heard, clearly the noise of battle.
1000623672.korean: - 먼 곳에서부터 전투의 소음인 것이 분명한 포성이 들려온다.

1000623673.english: I am sure others are struggling as well, but right now, your safety is the priority.
1000623673.korean: 분명 다른분들도 고전하고 계실테지만, 지금은 주인님의 안위가 우선입니다.

1000623674.english: ...Please remember that if the Master is not here, neither are we.

1000623675.english: I tried hard to calm myself down and tried to organize what I know right now.
1000623675.korean: - 애써 마음을 가라앉히며 지금 내가 알고있는 것을 정리해 보았다.

1000623676.english: - First of all, the current situation where we are being attacked by unidentified AGSs.
1000623676.korean: - 우선 정체 불명의 AGS에게 공격받고 있는 현재 상황.

1000623677.english: Based on the circumstances, it is certain that the Elf village and Cerestia are connected. Even if that is not the case, considering the villagers who were being dragged away, they are at least hiding something.
1000623677.korean: - 정황상 엘프 마을과 세레스티아가 관련되어 있는건 확실하다. 그것이 아니라도 끌려가던 마을 주민을 생각하면 최소한 뭔가 숨기는 것은 있다.

1000623678.english: However, there is one thing that weighs on my mind...

1000623679.english: Of course, even that could be a deception, but the look in Cerestia's eyes that briefly crossed my mind could not possibly be a lie.
1000623679.korean: - 물론 그것조차 기만책일수도 있겠지만, 잠깐 스쳐지나갔던 세레스티아의 눈빛은 도저히 거짓이라고는 생각되지 않는다.

1000623680.english: Master, there is something I was unable to tell you due to the urgent situation.
1000623680.korean: 주인님. 급박한 상황 때문에 미처 말씀드리지 못한 것이 있습니다.

1000623682.english: I followed the trail I missed earlier and discovered Black River's laboratory.
1000623682.korean: 아까 놓쳤던 흔적을 쫓아갔더니, 블랙리버의 실험실을 발견했어.

1000623683.english: For now, that's the case. It wasn't being used for that purpose right now.
1000623683.korean: 일단은 그래. 지금은 그 용도로 쓰이는 건 아니었어.

1000623684.english: It seems that... biological experiments were conducted there.

1000623685.english: It seems the experiment continued until recently. And...
1000623685.korean: 실험은 최근까지도 이어졌던 것 같아. 그리고...

1000623686.english: You know the resident without earrings who was said to have been dragged away? I saw him too.
1000623686.korean: 끌려갔다던 귀걸이가 없는 주민 있지? 걔도 봤어.

1000623688.english: That's not what the Commander imagines. But...

1000623689.english: The kid who was clearly dragged away screaming desperately was chatting with other kids as if nothing had happened.
1000623689.korean: 분명 처절하게 비명을 지르면서 끌려갔던 애가, 아무일도 없었던 것처럼 다른 애들이랑 잡담을 하고 있었어
